Package javax.media.mscontrol.join

An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them.

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
Joinable A Joinable is suitable for media composition.
JoinableContainer A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
JoinableDialog Implements a high level of abstraction of media interaction, for example a voicexml script interpreter.
JoinableStream A JoinableStream represents a media stream channel (or port), of a given type: audio, video, etc.
JoinEvent This event is delivered to the application upon completion of an asynchronous join operation.
JoinEventListener An application must register a JoinEventListener to be notified of a joinInitiate completion.
JoinEventNotifier Characteristics of objects able to send JoinEvent's.
 

Enum Summary
Joinable.Direction Indicates a direction for the media flow.
JoinableStream.StreamType Can be audio, video, or message.
 

Exception Summary
JoinException  
TooManyJoineesException  
 

Package javax.media.mscontrol.join Description

An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them.

Package Specification

The join/unjoin operations can be performed on Joinable objects like NetworkConnection or MediaGroup, or restricted to a JoinableStream of those.

The media flow can be restricted to a single Joinable.Direction.

Performance-concerned applications can use the asynchronous method joinInitiate
